scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.setup: rm -rf .venv && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements/dev.txt
scripts.setup:prod: rm -rf .venv && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements/base.txt
scripts.lint: .venv\Scripts\python -m ruff check backend/ tui/ devices/ scripts/
scripts.lint:fix: .venv\Scripts\python -m ruff check --fix backend/ tui/ devices/ scripts/
scripts.format: .venv\Scripts\python -m ruff format backend/ tui/ devices/ scripts/
scripts.format:check: .venv\Scripts\python -m ruff format --check backend/ tui/ devices/ scripts/
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test
